/usr/bin/ar qc libanalysis_lib.a CMakeFiles/analysis_lib.dir/analysis/IndicatorBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/analysis_lib.dir/analysis/indicators/MA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/analysis_lib.dir/analysis/indicators/EMA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/analysis_lib.dir/analysis/indicators/MACD.cpp.o CMakeFiles/analysis_lib.dir/analysis/indicators/RSI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/analysis_lib.dir/analysis/indicators/KDJ.cpp.o CMakeFiles/analysis_lib.dir/analysis/indicators/BOLL.cpp.o CMakeFiles/analysis_lib.dir/analysis/indicators/ATR.cpp.o CMakeFiles/analysis_lib.dir/analysis/IndicatorFactory.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libanalysis_lib.a
